steps.t: Durin is at Maergrind, the Noble Gate, in Máttugard.
Durin has asked you to search Durshulot in Deepscrave to learn what you can about Gorgar the Ruthless and his rule of the Orcs.
Durin is at Maergrind, the Noble Gate, in Máttugard. You have recovered a number of readable documents that may shed light on Gorgar's rule of the Orc…
Trausti has suddenly arrived and called for your attention. What has happened?
